item.title: The Idiots of Imgur: A Mini Dump pt 147
item.dc:creator: UncleSlam123

item.title: Time for the unhinged XL Friday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
comfort is everything
I’m on board with this
every single 80s-90s action flick? that’s a whole lot
ok that’s pretty good
finally
sounds painful
it’s the way to go
accurate
I have questions about the giant stick
mmm hmm
didn’t we all
thagomize is a perfectly cromulent word invented by Gary Larson
awww
dang
snow blowers are fun though
i tend to agree with them
that's it for me.. have a great weekend gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.dc:creator: LarryChupacabra

item.title: Special Ethiopian Opal sphere shows an interesting repetition in the vivid play of color.
item.description: This 12.30ct natural opal is from Ethiopia. It was cut into a sphere which gives it this unique repetition of color. Pretty cool!
item.dc:creator: MoreGems

item.title: Wholesome SATURDAY dump of smile pancakes
item.description:
1. Oh...
2. Happy elephant
3. He is so happy
4. This lady doesn't give a f
5
6. Lawdd he commin
7. I hope more seniors start doing sports, it has so many benefits
8
9. In case you missed you doze of Pizza Day posts yesterday, here is one on the house
10
11. A wholesome photo of Gamora, Mantis and Drax
12
13
14. I wish to everyone reading this to able to look at their photo as a kid someday and be able to say the exact same words
15. Thanks for scrolling all the way trough! Hope this dump made you happy! Finally I would like to share with you a little passion project of mine. Me and my brother are making a game that is inspired by "The Stanley Parable" and the narrator definitely has a touch a of GladOS to him. The game is part of Next Fest 2024 and it would the mean the world to us if you wishlisted: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse/ P.S. HAVE A GREAT WEEKEND!
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.title: The 405th vol. of "I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps
item.description:
Next week is my 40th Birthday and I will be taking a break from Dumping because I am old.
Pyro Pyronicus Pyrodiah
*after her grandmother
Second part is OC
My Addition
STAY TUNED! I'll be releasing more MeeMays back into the wild Monday-Friday around 11:30 am, GMT-5, in my ""I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so that I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps" Or use Imgur's "Follow" Feature, which will alert you whenever one of my dumps goes Viral.
so scary
I can't do that for 24 seconds
YES!
Damn right!
Yes
I think some of the "Bad" ones are pretty great.
NGL, I expected more in Texas
This is my newly commissioned Signature Image, by Dark Arts Studios. He's no longer on The Imgurs, I met him on ElbowDeepInAHorse's Discord Server. Here's where you can see his work: https://twitter.com/Anubis23342060 https://www.furaffinity.net/user/thed4rk1ord/ https://tailsofthegods.com/ https://dark-arts.itch.io/ FUN TIP / LIFE FACT / PRO HACK I upvote 90% - 99% of positive or neutral comments on my posts, as well as ≈50% of negative ones Shoutout to my fellow Dumpers: @DeafKitten @CodyBurkett @OhValleyOfPlenty @AbbiiStabbii @DigiT00l @MemeMuseumCurator @CeleryMan7 @DumpsterKoala @JebidiahBeetus @Kaeldra @KirbyVictorious @HermioneDanger00 @DumpReview @WhiskeyJelly @JasonPositivityPilot @danat101 @PotatoCheesMonk @VanessaNelson @NotMuchBiggerThanAWomprat @MindNumbingBraIncAndy @TheMellowMoron @TheWoodsAreVile @ThatOtherGirlYouKnow @IStealMemesAndStuff @DrWalters @DaymanAhAAAAah Lemme know If you are a Regular Dumper and would like to be added to the list! Archive Of Previous Dumps: Vols 1-300: https://imgur.com/a/vAfF9Wz Vols 301+ : https://imgur.com/a/oDakPaq Updated Whenever I Can Get Around To It #MemeDump #Phone_Dump #Dump #MeeMays #AdolfHitlerSchoolForTheArts #TheWhoring20s #SaveTheBEEEEEES #BeeLM #SaveTheBees #JettfreyEpsfuelCandnt #CommeltSteelBeamicide #WhatIfNobodyShotJFK #AndHisHeadJustDidThat #EatingAppsTakingNaps #EatNamesAndTakeAss #MasturbatingIsNecrophilia #IfYoureDeadInside #DumpyMcGeeAndGuyNamedSteve #2Dumps1Site #AllTiddiesAreGoodTiddies #FreeTheNipple

item.title: Zero dump #40, clearing my phone a little at a time
item.description:
Totk is a beautiful, flawless game with incredible building mechanics. Max creativity. But it would be better if the butter made a splat sound upon impact.
It was catchier in botw, IMO
Whenever I get super upset, I watch a serial killer show to calm down
Shit I'd pay to meet one physician that I don't want to punch in the throat by the end of one appointment
If I die, I die. Lot of nerve being friend shaped of not friend.
Taught a cat to do tricks in the past. Can confirm, he thought it gave him special permission for antics.
Leave me and my triple espresso out of this
FREE HIM
Mine is Hungarian in origin but not pronounced the original way. It's all around confusing. But I don't understand how they spell it wrong in an email when my name IS my email address...
And you can dye it to match his eyes
He's right you know
Hero
Valid
Me
Sound on!
And yet, not the dumbest things I've heard from men about women's bodies
Saved this for my perception class when we talk about music and emotion
I like it when I can get them to express all three in one class session
My dad was trying to say he wasn't excited about an aquarium, they're all the same. I told him about this creature. Now he agrees he needs to see one lol
Yep
Once an old man threw pennies at me and yelled "you don't tell me what to do", because I told him to have a nice day after checking him out at a staples
Cat tax: siblings are obligated to smack the shit out of each other once in a while
item.dc:creator: AnxiousCuttlefish

item.title: Images of Note: For even the Gods are bound to slip
item.description:
Polyamory is what is keeping Google Calendar afloat.
sometimes the spirit of sappho takes over and I say the most rizzy thing ever but most of the time i'm useless
The UK: because Screaming slowly in English and being abusive when your not understood is apparently a language.
:(
Maybe
The IT Crowd's biggest failing was that Glinner was too transphobic to realize IT techs include a lot of Femboys and transgirls.
https://www.tumblr.com/prinnay
they need their wife
Oh my
Unmute. Now.
This is my view of God
:For Chats: http://discord.abbii.gay For Shitposts: http://tumblr.abbii.gay For srs and maybe shitposts: http://mastodon.abbii.gay
item.dc:creator: abbiistabbii

item.title: Meet Blanche, the Lamplighter
item.description:
Blanche took over her husband’s candle making business after he passed. Since then she goes out every night to light the street lamps and replace the candles when needed. She is much beloved by her little town. Though she is a bit of a recluse unless she catch her on her nightly walks.
Here's the concept sketch. I knew I wanted a possum for this role immediately, a misunderstood nocturnal critter that wouldn't mind smelling like tallow.
The armature - aka Sculpture Bones
Nothing a little tin foil can't fix up.
Then just add clay and sculpt in the details. It's been a real game changer pre baking things like teeth and claws that I can just push into the softer clay.
I cannot state enough how proud I am of the UV resin glasses! They came out perfectly and magnify her little old lady eyes.
I'm using Sculpey translucent clay for the candles and teeth, super sculpey medium for the main body, and cosclay for the thinner areas like fabrics, ears, and her flexible tail.
While it was still a work in progress people thought I was making a rat or an alligator. The paint job clears that up immediately.
Boot the snoot
On to the final looks, I hid my artist signature on her apron.
Heehee look at that magnification!
Yes I did paint all the fabric designs by hand... the nitro cold brew did not help.
Her cane is both a candle snuffer, and a lighting wick
I looked at lots of pictures of babushka's in order to design her outfit which I adore. I painted tiny flames across her shawl as homage to her many candle lights.
I have yet to come up with a good name for this series. I’ve mostly been calling them D&D animals, but I suppose Blanche is more of an NPC than she is a standard DND class. Either way my goal is to make many many more of these enough to possibly have a gallery show… stay tuned for more. Lafayette the Bard - https://imgur.com/gallery/UWWOmrz Puddles & Chessie the Rogues - https://imgur.com/gallery/M7buxPO
item.dc:creator: tallandartsy

item.title: Weitz Guy
item.dc:creator: chazzsandiego

item.title: TheFreePizzaAngels are here!
item.description:
Hi everyone, we are TheFreePizzaAngels! Today we're going to send food to Imgurians in need. Come join us! If you'd like to help someone get food today, there are two easy ways: If you'd prefer to be an Anonymous Angel, contributions to our meal fund are always appreciated and one of us will gladly send out some food for you! https://www.paypal.me/TheFreePizzaDude https://ko-fi.com/thefreepizzadude Want to help someone directly as an Angel? Here's some helpful hints!
Any questions as an Angel? We're happy to help, just shoot us a message! If you're in need of food today, you're in the right place!!
If you want to make a request, please: - Have an active account *with more than just pizza requests* - Wait at least a full month after receiving help before asking for help again - Limit your (fulfilled) requests to no more than 3 times per 6 months We will only fulfill one grocery order per Imgurian.
NOTE: It's easier for us to assist USA-based requests, but we do our best to help fulfill requests from all over the world. PLEASE: include your location/country in your requests below. This greatly helps us to match you with a nearby Angel who can help. PLEASE: stick around and be available after making your request so you don't get passed up! ** Help us, so we can help you! ** Questions about requesting? Just leave a comment!
We'll be around and helping on the post, until 6pm CST.
Happy National Pizza Day everyone! 12,849 meals since we started 803 grocery orders sent 6 more hours to help as many people as we can! Let's get it going! ----- 1st, 2nd, 3rd and 4th pie by @MrPuckett, the OG, the one and only Free Pizza Dude himself! 5th pie by Pizza Angel @BadPunsAplenty 6th pie by Pizza Angel @shawnmilo 7th pie by Pizza Angel @shawnmilo 8th pie by Pizza Angel @shawnmilo 9th, 10th and 11th pie by Pizza Angel @gueerk 12th, 13th, 14th and 15th pie by Pizza Angel @AyatollahBahloni 16th pie by Pizza Angel @shawnmilo 17th and 18th pie by Pizza Angel @rawrberry 19th, 20th, 21st and 22nd pie by Pizza God @MrPuckett 23rd pie by Pizza Angel @appendyx 24th and 25th pie by Pizza Angel @onlynicethingstosay 26th pie by Pizza Angel @PuddleOfLoveJuices 27th, 28th and 29th pie by Pizza Angel @MorganVPI 30th, 31st and 32nd pie by Pizza Angel @MorganVPI 33th and 34st pie by our king @MrPuckett 35nd and 36rd pie by Pizza Angel @rawrberry 37th pie by Pizza Angel @rawrberry 38th, 39th and 40th pie by Pizza Angel @BadPunsAplenty 41st, 42nd (the answer to life, the universe and everything) and 43rd pie by Pizza Angel @MorganVPI 44th pie by Pizza Angel @PuddleOfLoveJuices 45th pie by Pizza Angel @BadPunsAplenty ----- That's it for me tonight. Thanks for helping out, everyone! Today we sent out 45 meals, that's a total of 12,894 meals since we started. We're getting pretty close to 13k! We'll see you next week :) Be excellent to each other
item.dc:creator: TheFreePizzaDude
